rationale: All four scheduled task creation events (A0, EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) correspond to well-known, legitimate software: Npcap's watchdog task (A0) pointing to a standard Npcap installation path, Mozilla Firefox's default browser agent (EV-001) authored by Mozilla, and two Aurora-Agent update tasks (EV-002, EV-003) authored by Nextron Systems — a reputable EDR/security vendor. The Npcap task (A0) is created by the machine account (WORKGROUP\host-01-$), consistent with a software installer running under SYSTEM context, and its action targets the expected Npcap installation directory. No anomalous command-line arguments, unusual parent processes, or suspicious file paths are present across any of the events, and no counter-evidence of tampering or masquerading is observed.
